breaking.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 18 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah
breaking.summary: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.

breaking.title: Kremlin acknowledges Ukrainian drone attack on Moscow, says strikes on Ukraine will continue
breaking.summary: Kremlin ⁠spokesman Dmitry Peskov told ‌reporters they should check out images from Ukrainian cities ‌that Russian forces had ​struck

breaking.title: Thirty-five killed as gunmen attack Niger's biggest airport
breaking.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.

breaking.title: America’s Iran playbook: after coercion, a return to diplomacy
breaking.summary: Despite any difference in ideologies, political affliations or strategies, every U.S. administration comes to the realisation that Iran cannot be bullied with airstrikes, sanctions or diplomatic isolation; treading the same path, Trump’s latest deal aims to address the most pressing dangers

breaking.title: Theatre stampede case: Court issues summons to actor Allu Arjun, others
breaking.summary: The Hyderabad police had earlier filed a charge sheet against 23 persons in the court in connection with the case

breaking.title: US Stock Market: Accenture’s AI transformation faces investor skepticism as stock plunges; CEO Julie Sweet remains confident
breaking.summary: Accenture's shares plunged nearly 20% after its fiscal third-quarter results revealed weaker-than-expected bookings and a softer outlook. CEO Julie Sweet insists the current phase reflects a multi-year AI-driven transformation, not structural weakness, as clients move from AI pilots to large-scale deployment.

breaking.title: Biden aide funded Wuhan lab to 'manipulate' Covid-19 assessments? Tulsi Gabbard's 'explosive' claim
breaking.summary: Former intelligence director Tulsi Gabbard released documents alleging Dr. Anthony Fauci funded gain-of-function research in Wuhan and misled Congress. The documents reportedly show Fauci's role in directing US taxpayer funds and interacting with intelligence officials to suppress lab-leak origins. These claims emerged during a declassification review, with whistleblowers alleging retaliation.

breaking.title: Asia's richest man Ambani announces what could be India's biggest share sale
breaking.summary: India's largest telecom operator is expected to raise around $4bn (£3.02bn), according to media reports.
